text:
he Moon in Aquarius, the native will be skilful in treating others well, while
hosting them, will be proficient in music, will be liked by the fair sex and will possess less
money and less happiness.
Should Jupiter aspect the Moon in Aquarius, the native will own villages, agriculture lands and
trees, be endowed with superior castles and superior ladies and will be devoted to (sensual)
enjoyment (Bhogi also means rich person, or a king)
If Venus aspects the Moon in Aquarius, the person will be base, issueless, friendless, timid, be
censured by preceptors, be sinful, will have a bad wife and will be least happy.
Should the Moon in Aquarius have Saturns aspect, the native will have (prominent) nails and hair,
be dirty, will seek union with other women, be a dunce, be irreligious and be rich possessing
many immovables.
79. MOON IN PISCES.
If the Moon is in Pisces, the native will be expert in fine arts, be capable of winning even
